name: Studio Force II 48
comment: Studio Force II 48 is specifically designed for TV Broadcast and film applications but also performs particularly well in other situation demanding high quality tuneable white light such as touring key lights, exhibitions, corporate events and theatre lighting. The Studio Force II uses the same ColorSure technologies found in other innovative Chroma-Q® fixtures to deliver consistent colour across fixtures.
